Vine in Stage 1 (far left screen) can be used over & over again
When you fire a super shot with your pistol (hold down the shoot button for 4 seconds), it only uses 1 part of your ammo (instead of 100)
When you use your pistol shield (hold down the shoot button for 2 seconds), it only uses 1 part of your ammo (instead of 10)
Jump twice as far (when standing still)
Jump the entire length of the screen (when standing still)
Most enemies are gone, and you can walk thru/over most walls or obstacles
No Power to the door near the end of Stage 2
No Steam on the Stage 3 Pipe Area
Soldiers Enemy Can't Kill You By Gun & Punch
